title: schizachyrium neomexicanum
intro: Schizachyrium neomexicanum, also known as Mexican bluestem, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schizachyrium neomexicanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Schizachyrium neomexicanum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
